content.speakerText: I'll pay inside with cash. Can I get a receipt?
content.speakerTextCn: 我进去用现金付，能给我收据吗？

options.text: No problem, I'll send it to your email.
You don't need one, do you?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Sure thing. Here you go!' 是对索要收据的自然回应，符合服务场景。选项2虽然语法正确，但‘发送到邮箱’不符合现金支付的即时场景；选项3是反问，显得不礼貌；选项4直接拒绝，不符合服务行业标准回应。

content.speakerText: I'm good with card. No receipt, thanks.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刷卡就行，不用收据了，谢谢。

options.text: All set! Have a safe trip!
Are you sure? You might need it for reimbursement.
Can I have your ID for the transaction?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'All set! Have a safe trip!' 是拒绝收据后的典型道别语，自然且礼貌。选项2虽然合理，但属于过度建议，不符合简洁服务语境；选项3无视顾客意愿；选项4与支付收据无关，属于错误信息索取。

content.speakerText: I'd like to pay by Apple Pay. Could I get a receipt?
content.speakerTextCn: 我想用苹果支付，能给我收据吗？

options.text: Of course. You want it printed or emailed?
Why do you need a receipt? It's digital.
Just tap and go, no receipt needed.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Of course. You want it printed or emailed?' 是对电子支付索要收据的恰当回应，提供选项体现服务意识。选项2带有质疑语气，不礼貌；选项3与前提矛盾；选项4直接否定请求，不符合服务标准。

content.template: I'll pay with cash. ___ I get a receipt?
content.hint: 索要收据最自然的表达方式
content.knowledgePoint: 请求服务的常用句型（Can I get...?）

content.template: I'll pay by card. ___ receipt, thanks.
content.hint: 拒绝收据时的简洁表达
content.knowledgePoint: 否定请求的惯用搭配（No + 名词）

content.template: I'd like to pay ___ credit card. Could you please print a receipt?
content.hint: 支付方式的正确介词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 支付方式的介词搭配（pay by credit card）

content.speakerText: I'll pay with cash. Can I get a receipt?
content.speakerTextCn: 我用现金支付，能给我收据吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! Do you want it printed or emailed?
Absolutely. I'll print one for you right away.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应了收据请求
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用了服务场景常用表达如 'Sure thing' 或 'Of course'
关键词覆盖：包含 'receipt' 或 'print/email' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I'm paying by card. No receipt, thanks.
content.speakerTextCn: 我刷卡支付，不用收据了，谢谢。
expectedAnswers: All set! Have a nice day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确接受顾客拒绝收据的请求
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当
表达自然度：使用了地道的道别语，如 'All set!' 或 'Have a nice day!'
关键词覆盖：包含服务结束的礼貌用语

content.speakerText: I'd like to pay with my phone. Can I get a digital receipt?
content.speakerTextCn: 我想用手机支付，能给我电子收据吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course! I'll email it to you right away.
Sure thing. Just give me your email address.
No problem. You'll receive it via text or email — which do you prefer?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：准确回应电子收据请求
语言准确性：使用正确句型和术语如 'digital receipt' 或 'email'
表达自然度：语气友好，符合现代服务场景
关键词覆盖：包含 'digital receipt', 'email', 'text' 等关键词
